svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (X11; Linux x86_64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) draw.io/26.2.2 Chrome/134.0.6998.178 Electron/35.1.2 Safari/537.36" version="26.2.2"> <diagram id="seq-config" name="Configuration Update Sequence"> <mxGraphModel dx="-495" dy="-119" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="900" pageHeight="450" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" value="Configuration Update Sequence" style="text;html=1;fontSize=18;fontStyle=1;align=center;fillColor=none;strokeColor=none;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="250" y="10" width="400" height="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="linux_box" value="Linux Gateway" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;shadow=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="120" y="50" width="150" height="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="mcu_box" value="MCU (STM32U575)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;shadow=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="580" y="50" width="150" height="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m1" style="rounded=0;strokeColor=#d79b00;strokeWidth=2;flowAnimation=1;" parent="1" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="195" y="130" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="655" y="130" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m1l" value="[TCP:5000] ConfigUpdate
{channel:0, rate:50Hz}" style="edgeLabel;html=1;fontSize=10;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#d79b00;" parent="m1" vertex="1" connectable="0"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="validate" value="1. Validate (1-100 Hz) ✓
2. Apply to timer
3. Store in flash (CRC)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=10;shadow=1;align=left;spacingLeft=10;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="620" y="155" width="200" height="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m2" style="rounded=0;strokeColor=#82b366;strokeWidth=2;dashed=1;" parent="1" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="655" y="240" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="195" y="240" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m2l" value="[TCP:5000] ConfigResponse {status: OK}" style="edgeLabel;html=1;fontSize=10;fontColor=#82b366;" parent="m2" vertex="1" connectable="0"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m3" style="rounded=0;strokeColor=#82b366;strokeWidth=2;flowAnimation=1;" parent="1" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="655" y="300" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="195" y="300" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m3l" value="[TCP:5001] SensorData (now at 50Hz)" style="edgeLabel;html=1;fontSize=10;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#82b366;" parent="m3" vertex="1" connectable="0"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="note" value="Config persists across MCU resets
(stored in flash with CRC-32)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=9;fontStyle=2;shadow=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="300" y="350" width="250" height="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
